# Integration Architecture: How BMS/SCADA Connectivity Determines Smart Factory Readiness

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
现代生物安全设备不再是独立系统，而是智慧工厂整体架构的组成部分。本角度分析气密门、传递窗等设备的 BMS（楼宇管理系统）接入能力，帮助 CTO 评估供应商的系统集成成熟度。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
BMS integration capability—protocol support, data logging depth, alarm management—distinguishes legacy equipment from Industry 4.0-ready solutions in biosafety applications.

## 参考素材
- Communication protocols: Modbus TCP, BACnet, OPC UA support matrix
- Data acquisition requirements: real-time pressure differential monitoring, seal status logging, cycle counting
- Alarm management per ISA 18.2: alarm rationalization, prioritization, acknowledgment workflows
- JIEHAO's RS232/RS485/TCP/IP multi-protocol support for flexible integration
- MES/ERP integration points for pharmaceutical manufacturing compliance

## 关键词
BMS Integration, Modbus TCP, SCADA, Industry 4.0, Data Acquisition, OPC UA, Smart Factory
